channel.title: Seeking Alpha - Earnings Calls Insights (custom)
channel.description: Custom RSS feed built from the publicly visible Seeking Alpha Earnings Calls Insights listing.

item.title: Alkami targets 18.5–19.6% revenue growth in 2026 outlook while accelerating DSSP adoption
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: Alkami Technology, Inc. (ALKT) Q4 2025

item.title: Imax outlines $1.4B 2026 global box office target while expanding premium content slate and network reach

item.title: Nu Holdings targets global expansion and AI integration in 2026 amid record $895M Q4 net income
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: Nu Holdings Ltd. (NU) Q4 2025

item.title: Agilent outlines $7.3B–$7.5B FY26 revenue target while expanding Ignite Operating System for margin growth
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: Agilent Technologies (A) Q1 2026

item.title: Snowflake outlines 27% product revenue growth outlook for FY '27 while expanding AI offerings and closing $400M contract
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: Snowflake Inc. (SNOW) Q4 2026

item.title: Veeco forecasts up to $800M revenue in 2026 as AI demand accelerates and backlog surges
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: Veeco Instruments Inc. (VECO) Q4 2025

item.title: TaskUs outlines 2026 revenue guidance of $1.21B–$1.24B amid $333M special dividend and AI investment
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: TaskUs (TASK) Q4 2025

item.title: Joby outlines $105M-$150M revenue target for 2026 while ramping manufacturing and Dubai launch
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: Joby Aviation (JOBY) Q4 2025

item.title: Tko outlines $5.7B–$5.8B revenue target for 2026 as focus shifts to high-margin media rights and capital returns
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: TKO Group Holdings, Inc. (TKO) Q4 2025

item.title: Synopsys outlines $9.56B–$9.66B revenue target for 2026 as Ansys integration advances
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: Synopsys (SNPS) Q1 2026

item.title: Revolution Medicines outlines $1.6B–$1.7B 2026 operating expenses as RAS(ON) inhibitor trials expand
item.description: Seeking Alpha Earnings Call Insights: Revolution Medicines (RVMD) Q4 2025

item.title: The Trade Desk outlines at least $678M Q1 revenue target as AI innovation and CTV momentum continue
